proofs: induction xs1 as [| n0 x xs1' IHxs1].

hypotheses:
IHxs1 : forall (xs2 : Vector.t A n0) (_ : eq (to_list xs1') (to_list xs2)),
eq xs1' xs2
EXT_EQ : eq (to_list (Vector.Vector.VCons n0 x xs1')) (to_list xs2)

proofs: induction xs1 as [|n x xs1' IH].

hypotheses:
IH : forall (xs2 : Vector.t A n) (_ : eq (to_list xs1') (to_list xs2)),
eq xs1' xs2
EXT_EQ : eq (to_list (Vector.Vector.VCons n x xs1')) (to_list xs2)

attempts:
induction n as [|n' IH]; intros xs1 xs2 H.
- destruct xs1; destruct xs2; reflexivity.
- inversion_clear xs1 as [|? h1 t1]; inversion_clear xs2 as [|? h2 t2]; injection H as [= Hhead Htail]; f_equal; [exact Hhead | apply IH; exact Htail].

induction n as [|n IH]; intros xs1 xs2 H.
- destruct xs1, xs2; reflexivity.
- destruct xs1 as [|n1 x xs1'], xs2 as [|n2 y xs2']; simpl in H. injection H as Hx Htl. apply IH in Htl. subst. reflexivity.
induction n; destruct xs1; destruct xs2; simpl in EXT_EQ; inversion EXT_EQ; reflexivity || (f_equal; [assumption | apply IHn; assumption]).

intros H. induction xs1 as [|n0 h1 t1 IHxs1] in xs2, H |- *.
- exact (match xs2 with VNil => eq_refl end).
- inversion xs2 as [| n0' h2 t2 Hlen]; subst n0'; simpl in H; injection H as [= Hhd Htl]; apply (f_equal2 (fun a b => VCons n0 a b) Hhd (IHxs1 t2 Htl)).

induction xs1 as [| n0 x xs1' IHxs1].
- destruct xs2; reflexivity.
- inversion xs2; subst.
-- discriminate EXT_EQ.
-- injection EXT_EQ as Hx Hlist. apply IHxs1 in Hlist. rewrite Hx, Hlist; reflexivity.

induction n; intros xs1 xs2 H.
- now destruct xs1, xs2.
- destruct xs1 as [|n' x xs1'], xs2 as [|n' y xs2']; simpl in H. injection H as H1 H2. rewrite H1. apply f_equal. apply IH. exact H2.

induction xs1 as [|n x xs1' IH].
- destruct xs2.
-- reflexivity.
-- discriminate.
- inversion xs2 as [|n0 x2 xs2' H1 H2]. subst. simpl in EXT_EQ. injection EXT_EQ as Hx Hlist. apply IH in Hlist. apply (f_equal2 (VCons n) Hx Hlist).

- inversion xs2 as [| n0' h2 t2 Hlen]; subst n0'; simpl in H; injection H as [= Hhd Htl]; apply (f_equal2 (fun a b => VCons n0 a b) Hhd (IHxs1 t2 Htl)).
